theoremName: augmented repair uniform quotient bound theorem
statement: The augmented repair forms are uniformly bounded in the transported trace quotient norm.

operatorBound.source: dMaxUpper interval endpoint from finite Schur constants

finiteRepairBoundInputStatus.label: finite repair bound input
finiteRepairBoundInputStatus.reason: The interval constants bound the finite D_aug,N spectral endpoint.

traceQuotientCompatibilityInputStatus.label: trace quotient compatibility input
traceQuotientCompatibilityInputStatus.reason: The transported quotient norm is identified by the quotient compatibility theorem.

uniformQuotientBoundStatus.label: uniform repair quotient bound
uniformQuotientBoundStatus.reason: The finite D_aug,N bound, interpreted through the transported quotient norm, gives a uniform boundedness constant for the repair forms.

proof: Import the finite interval upper bound for D_aug,N.
Use quotient compatibility to interpret the bound in the transported trace quotient norm.
Conclude a uniform quotient-norm form bound for the repair sequence.
